name: Ashforge Citadel
inside: Citadel courts, dedication halls, memorial arches, and weapon forges sit beside plazas made for public processions and ember dances.
interior_patterns: weapons forging is visibly part of daily life.
ancestral volcanic honor is visible, while renewal custom remains civic and household rather than temple doctrine
The difference between who belongs, who is tolerated, and who draws scrutiny becomes legible quickly once inside.
